data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"f06e-56d3","generatedAt":"2026-04-06T04:59:16Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Code Review Decision Gate: Hallucination Detection and Approach Viability Assessment","description":"Add hallucination detection, fragile severity, within-review model escalation, one-way ratchet, classifier floor rules, and approach viability signaling to the DSO code review pipeline.","successCriteria":["Standard/deep reviewers verify external API calls, model names, library functions exist; flag unverifiable references","New fragile severity blocks merge like important","Any reviewer below opus can emit ESCALATE_REVIEW for uncertain findings; orchestrator escalates to next tier","Escalation is one-way ratchet \u2014 never drops back","Opus verdicts are terminal","Classifier bumps light to standard for external API/unfamiliar imports","approach_viability_concern signal for orchestrator routing","Replaces deep-tier re-review escalation (pass 3+) with ESCALATE_REVIEW"]},"stories":[{"id":"53d5-76e4","title":"As a developer, review findings can identify structurally fragile code as a distinct severity that blocks merge","description":"Add fragile severity to finding model","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, fragile findings pass schema validation in all validators","When complete, fragile causes STATUS=failed in pass/fail gate","When complete, score-severity consistency accepts fragile with score 3 or below","When complete, resolution triage routes fragile to Fix or Defend only"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Atomic schema update across 5 files","[Adversarial] write-reviewer-findings.sh must be updated","[Adversarial] Score mapping must be exact (score 3)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":"foundation","splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"New fragile severity blocks merge like important"},{"id":"3d8a-0f49","title":"As a developer, reviewers verify external references exist and flag hallucinated code","description":"Add hallucination verification to standard/deep reviewer checklists","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, standard/deep checklists contain verification steps for external references","When complete, instructions distinguish internal APIs from external","When complete, unverifiable references flagged as fragile or important","When complete, reviewer-base.md schema includes fragile"],"considerations":["[Adversarial] reviewer-base.md schema example must include fragile","[Reliability] False positive risk on internal APIs"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["53d5-76e4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Standard/deep reviewers verify external API calls exist"},{"id":"54eb-fd24","title":"As a developer, reviewers can escalate uncertain findings to a more capable model","description":"Add ESCALATE_REVIEW signal to review pipeline","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, light/standard reviewers emit ESCALATE_REVIEW with uncertain finding IDs","When complete, orchestrator dispatches next-tier reviewer with focused context","When complete, opus ESCALATE_REVIEW ignored with warning","When complete, deep-tier parallel signals collected and deduped"],"considerations":["[Adversarial] reviewer-base.md output contract needs extension","[Adversarial] Deep-tier interception point must be defined","[Adversarial] Resolution agents must not emit signal"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["53d5-76e4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Any reviewer below opus can emit ESCALATE_REVIEW"},{"id":"8019-90b5","title":"As a developer, escalation to a higher model tier is permanent within a review cycle","description":"One-way ratchet and replace deep-tier re-review escalation","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, escalated tier persists for all subsequent re-reviews","When complete, pass 3+ deep pipeline removed, replaced by ratchet","When complete, pass 2 non-escalated behavior preserved"],"considerations":["[Adversarial] Escalation table boundary: remove pass 3+, preserve pass 2","[Adversarial] Coordinate with Story 6 on resolution loop"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["54eb-fd24"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Escalation is one-way
